name: Hidream I1 Dev
description: HiDream-I1 dev is a new open-source image generative foundation model with 17B parameters that achieves state-of-the-art image generation quality within seconds.
tagline: HiDream-I1 dev is a new open-source image generative foundation model with 17B parameters that achieves state-of-the-art image generation quality within seconds.
